title: Group Members Response Schema
description: Members of a group, for the admin Groups page "View members" modal. `data` is a flat array (no pagination — a single group's membership is expected to be small). A missing group is a 404, not an empty array; a group with no visible members returns []. Members are scoped to the same visible set as the users list (intern = false, id_status > 0), so the two screens agree on who exists.

email.description: User email (the column is NOT NULL for persisted users, but the getter is nullable)

status.description: userStatus lookup code (active/invited/interested/auto_created), same vocabulary as the users list; null if unset
